name: mise (native-tls)
description: Installs mise from the jdxcode/mise COPR repository to get a native-tls mise build.

version.description: mise version to install (e.g. "2024.12.19") or "latest" for the most recent release.

fedora_release.description: Fedora release to use for COPR build artifacts.

arch.description: CPU architecture. Auto-detected from uname -m when empty.
